description: Canonical Forge problem-solution memory record for Claude, Codex, and Gemini.

fields.sessionId: Short session identifier or equivalent local id.
fields.source: Origin of the record, for example forge-hooks or codex-learning.
fields.userMessageCount: Optional count of user messages seen in the source session.
fields.rootCause: Identified technical or process root cause.
fields.verification: Evidence or checks proving the fix.
fields.candidateSkillIds: Optional list of skills likely involved.
fields.extraction: Optional heuristic extraction metadata including mode, noSemanticMessages, field confidence, and source signal counts.
